creator: mdw@freebsd.org
text:
I changed my email address from manuel@mmap.at to mdw@freebsd.org, after I was kindly asked to do so[1]. As a former GSoC student, I have a FreeBSD.org email address even though I have no commit bit (and thus no Kerberos account). After changing my email address I can no longer log into Bugzilla.

In the past, I experienced similar issues when changing my password[2]. I suppose the problem is that Bugzilla tries to authenticate @freebsd.org email addresses against Kerberos.

I am still logged into one session, however, if this session expires I can no longer log into Bugzilla to reply. If that happens would it be passable to reply to bugmeister@ ?

Thanks in advance!

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=237605
[2] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277123
